transcript: Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I'm from Chennai, India. Speaker A: Your accent sounds great. Speaker B: A few months ago, I couldn't say a single word. Speaker A: How did you learn so fast? Speaker B: I have an AI tutor. Speaker A: Show me. Speaker C (AI): हे कमल, कैसे हो? [Hey Kamal, how are you?] Speaker B: Great, I was being interviewed right now. Speaker C: नहीं, 'I am being interviewed right now' बोलना चाहिए। [No, you should say 'I am being interviewed right now'.] Speaker B: I am being interviewed right now. Speaker C: बिल्कुल सही। इंटरव्यू किस बारे में है? [Exactly. What is the interview about?] Speaker B: It's about my English skills. They say me, I speak with confidence. Speaker C: 'They say me' नहीं, 'They say I speak with confidence' होगा। [Not 'They say me', it should be 'They say I speak with confidence'.] Speaker B: You're right, they say I speak with confidence. Speaker C: मेरे साथ तुम रोज़ इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव कर सकते हो। रोज़ 10 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो और एक महीने में अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने लगोगे। 50 लाख से ज़्यादा यूज़र्स MySivi में प्रैक्टिस करते हैं। सिर्फ ₹3 में MySivi शुरू करो। [With me, you can improve English daily. Practice 10 minutes daily and speak good English in a month. Over 50 lakh users practice on MySivi. Start MySivi for just ’3.] Speaker D: Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: YOU FROM? CHENNAI, INDIA. SOUNDS GREAT. MONTHS AGO, SINGLE WORD. LEARN SO FAST? AI TUTOR. SHOW ME. HOW. GREAT, I WAS BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW. I AM BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW. WHAT IS IT ABOUT? ENGLISH SKILLS. THEY SAY ME, CONFIDENCE. THEY SAY I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE. YOU'RE RIGHT, CONFIDENCE. mere saath hum roz English improve kar sakte hain [With me we can improve English daily] Roz 10 minute mere saath English practice karo [Practice English with me for 10 minutes daily] aur aap ek mahine mein achhi English bolne lagoge [and you will start speaking good English in a month] MySivi AI English Speaking... Install 5M+ Downloads Aap bhi kar lo [You do it too] Sirf ’3 mein MySivi shuru karo [Start MySivi for just ’3] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A street interview highlights a man who quickly improved his English using the MySivi AI tutor app. The AI avatar demonstrates real-time grammar correction and invites viewers to practice 10 minutes daily to speak fluent English in a month, offering a trial for ’3.
